text: Definition of paroxysmal AF: Paroxysmal AF: intermittent in nature, terminating spontaneously or within 7 days of treatment.
anchor_quote: Paroxysmal AF: intermittent in nature, terminating spontaneously or within 7 days of treatment

text: CHA2DS2-VASc stroke-risk model: The embolic risk in patients with AF is estimated using the CHA2DS2-VASc risk model (congestive heart failure, hypertension, age, diabetes mellitus, prior stroke, vascular disease, sex).
anchor_quote: The embolic risk in patients with AF is estimated using the CHA2DS2-VASc risk model (congestive heart failure, hypertension, age, diabetes mellitus, prior

text: Stroke risk rises with CHA2DS2-VASc score: The risk of AF-related ischemic strokes increases from 1.3% to 2.2% as the CHA2DS2-VASc score increases from 1 to 2.
anchor_quote: The risk of AF-related ischemic strokes increases from 1.3% to 2.2% as the CHA2DS2-VASc score increases from 1 to 2

text: HAS-BLED bleeding-risk model: HAS-BLED scoring system (hypertension, abnormal renal/liver function, stroke, bleeding history, labile international normalized ratio, elderly, drugs/alcohol) is widely used to estimate the risk of bleeding from anticoagulation.
anchor_quote: HAS-BLED scoring system (hypertension, abnormal renal/liver function, stroke, bleeding history, labile international normalized ratio, elderly, drugs/alcohol)

text: When anticoagulation is indicated: Benefits with antithrombotic therapy are well documented in moderate to high-risk AF patients (CHA2DS2-VASc score equal to 2).
anchor_quote: Benefits with antithrombotic therapy are well documented in moderate to high-risk AF patients (CHA2DS2-VASc score equal to 2)

text: Low-risk threshold caveat: However, its use in low-risk patients (CHA2DS2-VASc score less than 2) is often controversial.
anchor_quote: However, its use in low-risk patients (CHA2DS2-VASc score less than 2) is often controversial

text: Balancing benefit against bleeding risk: The benefits of anticoagulation should be balanced against the risk of bleeding.
anchor_quote: The benefits of anticoagulation should be balanced against the risk of bleeding

text: Warfarin INR monitoring target: Warfarin therapy needs constant monitoring with International Normalized Ratio (INR) to maintain the therapeutic range between 2.0 to 3.0.
anchor_quote: Warfarin therapy needs constant monitoring with International Normalized Ratio (INR) to maintain the therapeutic range between 2.0 to 3.0
